name: Easy Pralines
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium bowl, combine graham cracker crumbs, pecans, and salt; set aside.
2. In a heavy large saucepan, melt butter over medium heat.
3. Add sugar and evaporated milk to the saucepan. Stirring frequently, bring mixture to a boil.
4. Stirring constantly, boil mixture for 3 minutes.
5. Remove from heat. Add marshmallows and vanilla; stir until marshmallows melt.
6. Add graham cracker crumb mixture; stir until well blended.
7. Working quickly, drop tablespoonfuls of warm mixture onto waxed paper.
8. Cool. Store in an airtight container.
Yield: about 4 dozen pralines.
